Video.summary: These are the films that made Bruce Lee the greatest martial artist in Hollywood history.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is Sidney Poitier at his best: bold roles, powerful stories, and a legacy that transformed American cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Jack Nicholson's career is defined by charismatic charm, brilliant madness, and iconic performances across decades.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "The Big Sleep" to "Casablanca" and beyond, this is the best of Humphrey Bogart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Return to the outlaw days of the Old West with classics starring Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Saddle up as your favorite filmmakers talk beloved big screen Westerns!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From slapstick classics to timeless musical comedies, celebrate Hollywood's golden age of laughter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Irreverent, iconic, and effortlessly cool, this is 1960s comedy at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From campy capers to daring satire, let's celebrate the offbeat style of 1960s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Outrageous, rebellious, and unforgettable, 1970s comedy went full throttle.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold, bizarre, and brilliantly original, these 80s films defined a generation of laughs.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Quirky, irreverent, and instantly iconic, you favorite filmmakers celebrate the best of ’90s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: “Smokey and the Bandit” was dining with a “Fish Called Wanda” then the “Ghostbusters” showed up!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3

Video.summary: A “Serial Mom” went to a “Matinee” on “Groundhog Day,” it did not end well!

Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 4

Video.summary: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.
Video.title: His Girl Friday

Video.summary: No kids, we are not in Narnia. Let’s go to the “Little Shop of Horrors” and have a drink with “The Wild Angels.”
Video.title: The Chronicles of Corman

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From timeless romance to twisted love stories, Hollywood holds the key to our hearts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Falling In Love with Trailers from Hell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Allan Arkush delves into the world of movie music and the concert films that have wowed audiences for decades.
Video.title: The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush

The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush
The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Two unemployed show-biz pals accept treasure-diving work in Bali for a local princess and they find treasure, love and trouble.
Video.title: Road to Bali

Video.summary: Marlon Brando directs and stars as a prison escapee seeking revenge against his ex-partner (Karl Malden) in this 1961 Western, the only one Brando ever directed.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Audiences have loved seeing their favorite music stars on screen. Here are some greatest hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Music Legends On the Big Screen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Music documentaries and films that crank the volume with chaos, classic sounds, and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turn It Up: Rock Docs & Amped-Up Movies
